title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Alkem Laboratories

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Alkem Laboratories
jsonLd.description:
Alkem Laboratories has an exciting opening for a Medical Officer at our Bengaluru office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Alkem Laboratories:
Alkem Laboratories is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Health Informatics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Alkem Laboratories!
